$comment: Project MCP config — lets Claude Code / Cursor drive the running Dagster instance (dg dev at :3000) through dagster-mcp (21 tools: runs, assets, jobs, schedules/sensors, launch_job, backfill_assets, reload_code_location). READ-ONLY by default; set DAGSTER_READ_ONLY=false to allow launches/backfills/terminations. See docs/runbooks/run-dagster.md.
